Galbraith joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Sam Fazeli fresh from the ASCO conference to unpack how ctDNA, earlier intervention and next-generation oncology platforms could reshape cancer care. They discuss AstraZeneca’s Stride regimen in liver cancer, Serena-6 in breast cancer, progress in

summary: The S&P 500 Index dropped, reversing earlier gains, as a rotation out of technology stocks that propelled the stock market higher for most of the year gained traction.

title: Zambia’s $65 Million Sweetener Wins Support for Bond Buyback
title_cn: 赞比亚6500万美元甜味剂赢得债券回购支持
summary: Zambia has received enough support from bondholders to buy back its 2053 dollar debt in full, after offering an extra $65 million to pull in a group of holdout creditors that resisted the transaction.

title: Nasdaq 100 Falls 2% as Chipmakers Sell Off Again: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 芯片制造商再次抛售纳斯达克 100 指数下跌 2%：市场结束
summary: A rotation that has seen investors bail from richly priced technology names in favor of more economically sensitive industries resumed, dragging down the S&P 500 while lifting the majority of its companies.

title_cn: 法国中小企业贷款支持的债券有望打开新市场
summary: French state-backed lender Bpifrance SACA sold a new type of bond backed by small company loans as it pushed to end a more than decade-long regulatory impasse over European Secured Notes.

title: Sugar Swings as Traders Weigh Brazil Output Against Deficit Risk
title_cn: 交易商权衡巴西产量与赤字风险，糖价波动
summary: Sugar futures fluctuated in New York as traders weighed ample Brazilian supplies against mounting El Niño risks that could tighten global supplies later this year.

title: Korean Won Resilience Amid Equity Outflows
title_cn: 韩元在股市流出中表现强劲
summary: Dayeon Hong, NATIXIS APAC Rates & FX Strategist, discussed the recent dynamics in South Korea's financial markets, highlighting the resilience of the Korean won despite significant equity sell-offs and foreign outflows. Government interventions and hedging by the National Pension Service have supported the won's appreciation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Assets Stage Rebound as Sharp Losses Lure Dip Buyers
title_cn: 大幅亏损吸引买家，新兴资产出现反弹
summary: Emerging-market assets rallied on Tuesday, with investors buying the dip in shares of Asian companies tied to the artificial intelligence theme and currencies rebounding after Iran and Israel paused hostilities.

title: Inflation Pressures Rise in Asia Despite Fuel Price Caps
title_cn: 尽管存在燃油价格上限，亚洲通胀压力仍在上升
summary: Deepali Bhargava, ING Head of Research and Chief Economist for APAC, discussed the current inflation dynamics in Asia in the context of recent geopolitical developments, including a fragile ceasefire and renewed tensions in the Middle East. She highlighted that growth across Asia has remained stronger than expected, supported in part by the tech export sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Basque Region Sells €500 Million Bond for Industrial Policy
title_cn: 巴斯克地区出售 5 亿欧元产业政策债券
summary: The Basque government raised €500 million ($577 million) in a sale of bonds to support the Spanish region’s industrial investment strategy.

title: Schwab's Sonders Warns of 'Red Flags,' Possible Inflationary Boom
title_cn: 施瓦布的桑德斯警告“危险信号”，可能出现通货膨胀繁荣
summary: Charles Schwab Chief Investment Strategist Liz Ann Sonders says markets may have become complacent about the economic impact of rising energy prices. Speaking with Vonnie Quinn on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Sonders says the economy is on the brink of a potential spike in oil prices and there's a big disconnect between the soft, survey-based economic data and the actual hard data. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Resumes Pullback After Israel and Iran Agree to End Strikes
title_cn: 以色列和伊朗同意结束袭击后金价恢复回调
summary: Gold resumed declines after Israel and Iran agreed to end attacks that had jeopardized talks to end the war in the Middle East and the US dollar pared losses.

title: Treasury Market Signals Rates Need to Be Higher
title_cn: 国债市场信号表明利率需要更高
summary:
The $31 trillion Treasury market has an unequivocal message for Kevin Warsh’s Federal Reserve: Interest rates aren’t high enough. 
The reset upwards only intensified last week after the latest read on job growth topped all forecasts, reinforcing a growing conviction that rates need to rise in order to rein in inflation pressures and temper the risk of an AI-induced boom overheating the economy.
David Seif, Chief Economist for Developed Markets at Nomura, discusses his expectations for the Fed's path forward. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bonds Drop as Israel-Iran Strikes Raise Inflation Fears
title_cn: 以色列和伊朗的袭击引发通胀担忧，债券下跌
summary: US stocks have staged a modest rebound even as flaring tensions in the Middle East sent oil prices and bond yields higher.  Futures for the S&P 500 rose 0.2% after a selloff in artificial intelligence stocks came to a halt. Bond traders are wagering that inflation figures this week will show the biggest surge in consumer prices in several years, adding to pressure on the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates. Global bond markets have seen a profound shift since late February, when the US and Israel's attacks on Iran sparked a surge in oil prices, derailing bets that the central bank was poised to lower rates in 2026. Lindsay Rosner, Head of Multi-Sector Investing at Goldman Sachs Asset Management explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Airbus Unsure of Reaching A320 Target Due to Pratt Problems
title_cn: 由于普拉特问题，空客不确定能否达到 A320 目标
summary: Airbus SE is unsure of reaching next year’s production target for its best-selling A320 jet because Pratt & Whitney may not be able to supply enough engines, the planemaker’s chief executive officer said.

title: Stocks Join Bonds Higher as Oil Falls Below $90
title_cn: 油价跌破 90 美元，股市跟随债券走高
summary:
A rebound on Wall Street powered ahead, with stocks joining bonds higher as oil fell amid hopes the US and Iran are getting closer to a deal to end the war that has rattled global markets.
Liz Ann Sonders, Chief Investment Strategist at Charles Schwab, discusses her midyear outlook as the market drives higher. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apotex Targets Top End of Range in Biggest Canada IPO Since 2021
title_cn: Apotex 瞄准 2021 年以来加拿大最大规模 IPO 的上限
summary: Apotex Health Corp. is guiding investors to expect its Toronto initial public offering to price at the top of the marketing range later Tuesday, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Kenya Retains Benchmark Interest Rate for Second Time
title_cn: 肯尼亚第二次维持基准利率
summary: Kenya’s central bank left its benchmark interest rate unchanged for the second time in a row, as it monitors the impact of the ongoing conflict in Iran on the economy.

title: US Existing-Home Sales Rise to Fastest Pace of the Year
title_cn: 美国现房销售增速创年内最快
summary: Existing-home sales in the US accelerated to their fastest pace of the year in May, with contract closings rising to an annualized rate of 4.17 million. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Falls as Israel-Iran Attacks Halt
title_cn: 以色列和伊朗袭击停止，油价下跌
summary:
Oil declined after Israel and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other following a flare-up in violence, while new data shed light on the extent of a drop in Chinese imports.
Amrita Sen, Founder and Director at Energy Aspects, discusses the latest moves in the energy market as US talks with Iran continue. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JM Smucker Moves on Profit Beat; Vail Resorts Down on Full Year Guidance Cut | Stock Movers
title_cn: JM Smucker 继续盈利；韦尔度假村下调全年业绩指引库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Nuvalent (NUVL) shares are higher on news GSK agreed to buy Nuvalent for $10.6 billion, securing a US biotech firm developing treatments for lung cancer.
- JM Smucker (SJM) shares are on the move after it posted fourth-quarter profits that beat Wall Street expectations as higher prices helped boost the packaged food company.
- Vail Resorts (MTN) is dropping after the ski resort operator cut its net income guidance for the full year, attributing the reduction to “historically challenging” weather conditions in the western US. The guidance missed the average analyst estimate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Falls as China Slashes Imports and Tenuous Peace Holds
title_cn: 随着中国削减进口和脆弱的和平维持，油价下跌
summary: Oil declined after new data shed light on demand destruction in China, providing much-needed relief for global oil supplies strained by the war in Iran.

title: Three Charts That Sum Up the Big AI Debates Right Now
title_cn: 三张图表总结了当前关于人工智能的重大争论
summary: Capital spend, ROI, and energy.

title: South Africa Targets Key Mining Registry by End of March
title_cn: 南非的目标是在三月底之前完成主要矿业登记
summary: South Africa expects to fully launch a long-awaited database of mineral rights within 10 months, according to a senior official.

title: New York Penn Station Rehab Eyes Billions in Federal Funding
title_cn: 纽约宾州车站康复中心寻求数十亿联邦资金
summary: The entities transforming New York’s Penn Station are slated to learn how much federal money will be directed to the project in about six months, according to Peter Cipriano, chief executive officer of the Halmar-Skanska consortium, the renovation’s master developer.

title: Airbus CEO Faury Says Supply Chain Is in a 'Much Better Place'
title_cn: 空客首席执行官福里表示供应链处于“更好的位置”
summary: Airbus CEO Guillaume Faury comments on the planemaker's supply chain and orders during an interview with Bloomberg's Benedikt Kammel at the Berlin Aviation Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Smucker Plans to Lower Coffee Prices Next Year as Costs Decline
title_cn: 随着成本下降，斯马克计划明年降低咖啡价格
summary: JM Smucker Co. said it planned to lower coffee prices next year as the cost comes down.

title: Indonesia Delivers Shock Rate Hike to Reverse Market Selloff
title_cn: 印度尼西亚大幅加息以扭转市场抛售
summary: Indonesia’s central bank took aggressive action to reverse a market selloff and support its currency, hiking interest rates in a surprise decision to halt foreign outflows triggered by policy uncertainty under President Prabowo Subianto.

title: BP CEO Shakes Up Structure in Push Back to Oil and Gas
title_cn: 英国石油公司（BP）首席执行官重组结构以推动石油和天然气业务
summary: New BP Plc Chief Executive Officer Meg O’Neill reorganized the energy giant’s leadership and reporting structures in an overhaul that cements the company’s focus on oil and gas as it tries to move beyond recent boardroom drama.

title: French Media Giant Canal+ Gains in South Africa Debut
title_cn: 法国媒体巨头 Canal+ 在南非首秀斩获佳绩
summary: Canal+ SA rose in its debut on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange, with the secondary listing of the French media giant marking the completion of its multibillion-dollar acquisition of African pay-TV giant MultiChoice.

title: Sigma Court Victory Eases Uncertainty Around Lithium Expansion
title_cn: 西格玛法院的胜利缓解了锂业扩张的不确定性
summary: Sigma Lithium Corp. said it won an appeal in Brazil that overturned a lower-court ruling tied to environmental complaints at its sole lithium mine, easing uncertainty as the company pursues a major expansion.

title: AI Selloff a ‘Wake-Up Call’ for Investors, Wells Fargo Says
title_cn: 富国银行表示，人工智能抛售给投资者敲响了“警钟”
summary: Friday’s technology-driven selloff was a “wake-up call” for investors, according to Wells Fargo & Co., which said it has highlighted the risks of piling into the artificial-intelligence trade.

title: Asia’s Largest Outsourcer to Slow Hiring as AI Reshapes Industry
title_cn: 人工智能重塑行业，亚洲最大外包商将放缓招聘速度
summary: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd., Asia’s largest outsourcer, will reduce hiring going ahead as it steps up the use of artificial intelligence agents, marking a pivotal shift in India’s labor-intensive outsourcing industry.

title: Meta Ordered by EU to Halt WhatsApp Curbs on AI Rivals
title_cn: 欧盟命令 Meta 停止对人工智能竞争对手 WhatsApp 的限制
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has been ordered by the European Union to temporarily halt policies that allegedly block rival AI firms from operating on its WhatsApp messaging service for businesses.

title: SpaceX IPO Draws Orders for Multiple Times the Shares Available
title_cn: SpaceX IPO 吸引的订单数量是现有股票数倍
summary: SpaceX’s initial public offering has attracted demand from institutional investors for multiple times the available shares, according to people familiar with the matter, as the Elon Musk-led rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence firm’s debut gets closer.

title: No Chips Can Be Designed Without Synopsys, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，没有新思科技就无法设计任何芯片
summary: Sassine Ghazi, Synopsys chief executive officer, talks about the growth of artificial intelligence, how it's integrated Ansys, an engineering software company it bought last year, and he says there are no chips that can be designed today without Synopsys. He speaks to Bloomberg's Romaine Bostick at the Mizuho Technology Conference in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Expectations From Apple’s Big AI, Siri Launch
title_cn: 对苹果大人工智能 Siri 的期待
summary: Carolina Milanesi, Creative Strategies president and principal analyst, joins Ed Ludlow in Cupertino, California to discuss what happens next after Apple rolls out an overhauled version of the Siri digital assistant, and the importance of having the AI embedded into the consumer's devices. She joins on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Roblox Shares Rise on Report Russia May Unblock Gaming Platform
title_cn: Roblox 股价因俄罗斯可能解除封锁游戏平台而上涨
summary: Roblox Corp. shares jumped after a report Russian government agencies proposed lifting restrictions on the company’s gaming platform, though any final decision rests with law enforcement authorities.

title: Crusoe Touts 5 Gigawatts of Data Centers, Pauses Wyoming Site
title_cn: Crusoe 宣称拥有 5 吉瓦的数据中心，但暂停了怀俄明州站点
summary: Crusoe, a developer of data centers for companies like OpenAI and Microsoft Corp., said it has contracts for almost 5 gigawatts of capacity, even though it has paused work on a significant project in Wyoming.

title: Oura Ring 5 is 40% Smaller and Has New Health Features
title_cn: Oura Ring 5 体积缩小 40%，并具有新的健康功能
summary: Oura Ring 5 is here, 40% smaller — closer to the size of a wedding band — and has some brand new health features. Mark Gurman explores how the Oura Ring has evolved, generation by generation  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI Can Rewrite History for Megacap IPOs
title_cn: SpaceX、Anthropic、OpenAI 可以改写 Megacap IPO 的历史
summary: The history of megacap initial public offerings shows that the stocks usually slump in the first year of trading. But upcoming listings from SpaceX, Anthropic and OpenAI are big enough and systemically important enough to the market that those analogies may not apply.

title: Apple Expands Child Safety Tools as Social Media Bans Grow
title_cn: 随着社交媒体禁令的增加，苹果扩展了儿童安全工具
summary: Apple Inc. is expanding tools for parents to protect children online, a move that comes as governments around the world are increasingly banning social media for young people.

title: Taiwan Eyes Curbs on AI Chip Sales to China to Align With US
title_cn: 台湾希望与美国保持一致，限制对中国大陆的人工智能芯片销售
summary: Taiwan authorities are considering much stricter export controls on AI chip sales to China to further align with US measures, according to people familiar with the matter, an effort to address semiconductor smuggling that risks drawing a rebuke from Beijing.

title: Europe’s Space Race Gains Pace With Iceye’s Jump to €10 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Iceye 估值跃升至 100 亿欧元，欧洲太空竞赛加快步伐
summary: Finnish satellite-intelligence company is one in an ecosystem of space-based industries that’s emerging in Europe

title: Clip Partners With Ant on Consumer Payments Wallet in Mexico
title_cn: Clip 与蚂蚁金服合作开发墨西哥消费者支付钱包
summary: Mexican payments company Clip is launching a digital wallet as it pushes to bring millions of consumers and small businesses into the country’s formal financial system.

title: Banks Sell Out After Broadband Firms’ Land Grab Backfires
title_cn: 宽带公司抢地盘适得其反，银行纷纷抛售
summary: Banks with exposure to heavily-indebted broadband providers are selling their loans to distressed debt funds at a discount, a sign of their increasing weariness with the cash-strapped sector.

title: Klarna Launches US Savings Accounts to Attract Everyday Users
title_cn: Klarna 推出美国储蓄账户以吸引日常用户
summary: Klarna Group Plc is launching savings accounts in the US as the digital lender looks to deepen its core banking business and attract more everyday users.

title: Ad Agencies Are a Buying Opportunity in AI Era, Berenberg Says
title_cn: 贝伦贝格表示，广告公司是人工智能时代的购买机会
summary: Investor jitters about the potential disruption caused by artificial-intelligence adoption has created a broad-based buying opportunity for the shares of European advertising agencies, according to Berenberg analysts.

title: Japan Inc.’s Shake-Up Sparks Flashbacks to Dot.com Boom and Bust
title_cn: 日本公司的重组引发了对互联网繁荣与萧条的回顾
summary: The rise to the top by AI-related companies has parallels to an earlier bubble

title: Standard Bots Raises $200 Million to Manufacture Robots in US
title_cn: Standard Bots 融资 2 亿美元用于在美国制造机器人
summary: Standard Bots has raised $200 million in a new round of funding to ramp up manufacturing of robotic arms in the US as the country vies to keep pace with China in building more advanced robots.

title: AI Rivals Race to Market, Intesa Exclusive | The Pulse 6/9/2026
title_cn: 人工智能竞争对手竞相进入市场，联合银行独家|脉搏 6/9/2026
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Carlo Messina, Intesa Sanpaolo CEO; Angel Ubide, Citadel Head of Economic Research for Global Fixed Income & Macro; Steve Wise, Carlyle Co-Head of Americas Corporate Private Equity; Lawrence Freedman, King's College London War Studies Emeritus Professor
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Preps $295 Billion Plan to Fund AI Buildout
title_cn: 中国准备2950亿美元计划资助人工智能建设
summary: China is planning to spend around 2 trillion yuan ($295 billion) over the next five years to build data centers across the country. Neil Campling reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Delays Siri AI for iPhone Users in the EU, Says Regulators Refusing to Engage
title_cn: 监管机构拒绝参与 苹果推迟向欧盟 iPhone 用户提供 Siri AI
summary: Apple Inc. said it isn’t able to launch Siri AI, its redesigned digital assistant, on iPhones, Apple Watches or iPads in the European Union, marking the company’s latest standoff with the continent’s antitrust watchdog.

title: China Preps $295 Billion Plan to Fund Nationwide AI Buildout
title_cn: 中国准备2950亿美元计划资助全国人工智能建设
summary: China is preparing to spend around 2 trillion yuan ($295 billion) over the next five years on building data centers across the country, fueling Beijing’s ambition to propel the domestic AI sector and surpass the US in a potentially game-changing technology.

title: Robots May Help Defuse US-China Tensions
title_cn: 机器人可能有助于化解中美紧张局势
summary: The two countries have vital tech for the coming wave of robots

title: AI Earnings Durability Is in Focus for BlackRock’s Wei Li
title_cn: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的李伟 (Wei Li) 关注人工智能盈利的持久性
summary: Wei Li, chief global investment strategist at BlackRock, says there is a “healthy debate to be had” about the durability of Artificial Intelligence earnings and sees the AI trade as a “space to be selective and active.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Calls Mythos Dangerous. Why Is It Expanding Access?
title_cn: 人择称神话是危险的。为什么要扩大准入范围？
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its new artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. The AI giant initially released Mythos to a small group of carefully chosen parties because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic says, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: Uber-Backed Wayve Eyes Stake Sale on the UK’s New Private Market
title_cn: Uber 支持的 Wayve 着眼于英国新私人市场出售股份
summary: Wayve Technologies Ltd., the UK-based autonomous driving software startup, is considering letting investors sell shares through the country’s new private securities market, according to people familiar with the matter, in what would be the first major endorsement of the novel system.

title: Iconiq-Backed IT Startup NinjaOne Hits $12.3 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Iconiq 支持的 IT 初创公司 NinjaOne 估值达到 123 亿美元
summary: NinjaOne, an IT management platform, has more than doubled its valuation to $12.3 billion in a new financing deal, bucking the trend of investors shying away from software-as-a-service companies over AI fears. The startup is set to announce Tuesday that it’s raised $400 million in a secondary share sale. Wellington Management, Iconiq Capital, Alphabet Inc.’s CapitalG and Sequoia Capital participated in the deal, which saw some early investors and longtime employees sell equity. NinjaOne was prev

title: Iceye Valuation Jumps to €10 Billion in Funding Round Led by General Atlantic
title_cn: 在 General Atlantic 领投的一轮融资中，Iceye 估值跃升至 100 亿欧元
summary: Iceye Oy quadrupled its valuation to more than €10 billion ($11.5 billion) in a General Atlantic-led funding round that will help the Finnish satellite-intelligence company expand to meet demand for sovereign technology systems.

title: Kenyan Police Clash With Protesters Over US Ebola Facility
title_cn: 肯尼亚警方因美国埃博拉设施与抗议者发生冲突
summary: Kenyan police fired teargas at protesters demonstrating against a planned quarantine facility for US servicemen and citizens exposed to the Ebola virus.

title: UK’s Starmer to Announce Under-16s Social Media Ban in Days
title_cn: 英国 Starmer 几天内宣布禁止 16 岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is preparing to announce a ban on under-16s using social media within days after his position hardened following parents’ response to a government consultation.

title: Peru’s Diaspora Emerges as Tie-Breaker in Razor-Edge Presidential Race
title_cn: 秘鲁侨民成为刀锋总统竞选中的决胜者
summary: Peru’s presidential election is so tight that it’ll likely be citizens abroad, rather than those from within the country, who will break the tie.

title: Michigan, Canada Plan Opening of Bridge Trump Threatened to Block
title_cn: 密歇根州和加拿大计划开通大桥 特朗普威胁要阻止
summary: Officials in the US and Canada are planning a ribbon-cutting ceremony in the coming days for a new C$6.4 billion ($4.6 billion) bridge linking Michigan to the province of Ontario, which President Donald Trump threatened to block earlier this year.

title: How a Meme Becomes a Political Movement
title_cn: 模因如何成为一场政治运动
summary: From shrinking returns on education to the fading hopes of a middle-class life, India’s youth have many reasons to feel wounded. One insult from from the chief justice of India may have been the last straw, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Andy Mukherjee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Accuses Alibaba, Baidu of Aiding China’s Military
title_cn: 五角大楼指责阿里巴巴、百度援助中国军方
summary: The Pentagon accused some of China’s biggest companies, including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., Baidu Inc. and BYD Co. of supporting the Chinese military, doubling down on an earlier decision to label crown jewels of the country’s corporate world as threats to US national security.

title: Becerra, Hilton Advance in California Governor Election, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: Becerra、希尔顿在加州州长选举中取得进展，DDHQ 项目
summary: The race for California governor is on track for a two-person runoff in November between veteran Democratic politician Xavier Becerra and Republican Steve Hilton, a British-born television personality endorsed by President Donald Trump.

title: Trump Says Peace Talks on Track After Israel-Iran Clash Ends
title_cn: 特朗普称以色列和伊朗冲突结束后和平谈判步入正轨
summary: US President Donald Trump renewed his claims of momentum toward ending the conflict with Iran, after brokering a halt to hostilities between Israel and the Islamic Republic and easing tensions that had threatened to derail broader peace efforts.

title: US Strikes India-Crewed Tanker That May Have Been Iran-Bound
title_cn: 美国袭击可能开往伊朗的印度油轮
summary: The US military fired at an empty tanker for its suspected involvement in the Iranian oil trade this week as Washington continues to enforce a blockade of the Islamic Republic’s ports.

title: Xi Cements Sway Over North Korea as Kim Names China Top Priority
title_cn: 金正恩将中国列为首要任务，习近平巩固了对朝鲜的影响力
summary: Kim Jong Un feted Chinese President Xi Jinping with two days of lavish celebrations in Pyongyang, calling ties with China a “top priority” in a clear message that Beijing, not Moscow, remains North Korea’s most important partner.

title: Nevada Primaries Offer Test of Republicans’ Midterm Pitch
title_cn: 内华达州初选是对共和党中期竞选的考验
summary: A marquee piece of the GOP’s tax bill is struggling in Vegas

title: Trump’s No Tax on Tips Gamble Risks Falling Short With Disgruntled Vegas Voters
title_cn: 特朗普对赌博小费不征税的政策可能无法满足拉斯维加斯选民的不满
summary: Higher prices and tourism declines are blunting the financial impact of the president’s tax relief.

title: Trump's 'No Tax On Tips' Isn't Persuading Nevada Voters
title_cn: 特朗普的“小费不征税”并不能说服内华达州选民
summary: Las Vegas took a hit in the first year of Trump’s term with a sharp drop in tourism, blunting the financial impact of the president’s “no tax on tips” policy. Now voters are headed to the polls in a primary election that could have an outsized impact this fall. Caitlin Reilly reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bulgaria’s New Government to Stop Supplying Weapons to Ukraine
title_cn: 保加利亚新政府将停止向乌克兰供应武器
summary: Bulgaria’s newly-appointed government plans to end providing weapons to Ukraine in a move that would run counter to European attempts to pressure Russia to end the war.

title: Xi, Kim Both Got What They Wanted From Their Summit
title_cn: 习近平和金正恩在峰会上都得到了他们想要的
summary: The leaders of China and North Korea used two days of pomp to project a united front.

title: Germany Pursues New Partners After Next-Gen Jet Collapse
title_cn: 德国在下一代喷气式飞机坠毁后寻求新合作伙伴
summary: Germany is seeking new partners to build a next-generation fighter jet after a prestigious project with France collapsed over disagreements between industry partners.

title: Graham Platner’s Scandals Risk Spoiling Democrats’ Bet in Maine
title_cn: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳的丑闻可能会破坏民主党在缅因州的赌注
summary: Graham Platner heads into Maine’s Democratic Senate primary on Tuesday facing a fresh bout of controversy, turning what had looked like a coronation into a test of whether he’s a viable candidate for the party’s push to secure a majority in this year’s midterms.

title: Philippines Says China Has ‘Illegal’ Structure in Disputed Shoal
title_cn: 菲律宾称中国在争议浅滩拥有“非法”建筑
summary: The Philippines said it has monitored a floating structure in a disputed shoal in the South China Sea, in a development that could ratchet up tensions with Beijing.

title: 10 Years of Brexit: What's the Cost and What's Next?
title_cn: 英国脱欧十年：代价是什么以及下一步是什么？
summary: Ten years after Brexit, analysis published by Bloomberg on Tuesday shows that the UK’s vote to leave the European Union may have already cost the British economy between 2% and 4% of gross domestic product. Dan Hanson of Bloomberg Economics explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Malaysia Islamist Party Breaks With Ally, Jolting Opposition
title_cn: 马来西亚伊斯兰党与盟友决裂，震动反对派
summary: Malaysia’s largest Islamist party has moved to sever formal ties with its ally, deepening a rift within the opposition bloc ahead of the next general election.

title: OpenAI Files for IPO with SpaceX Debut Well Oversubscribed | Daybreak Europe 6/09/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 申请首次公开募股 (IPO)，SpaceX 首次亮相就获得超额认购欧洲黎明 6/09/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

OpenAI, the maker of ChatGPT, filed confidentially for an IPO, joining artificial intelligence rivals in tapping public markets to fund ambitious growth plans. SpaceX’s initial public offering is well oversubscribed with multiple institutional investors placing orders for about $10 billion or more of shares in the Elon Musk-led company, according to people familiar with the matter, as demand builds for a potentially record-setting debut.

A rebound in equities that began on Wall Street extended into Asia, as cheaper valuations for artificial intelligence shares lured investors. Crude oil declined as tensions in the Middle East eased. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Becerra, Hilton on Track for California Governor Race
title_cn: 贝塞拉和希尔顿有望参加加州州长竞选
summary: The race for California governor is on track for a two-person runoff in November between veteran Democratic politician Xavier Becerra and Republican Steve Hilton, a British-born television personality endorsed by President Donald Trump. Bloomberg's Jon Herskovitz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Moves to Shift Cost of Drone Defenses Onto Companies
title_cn: 俄罗斯采取行动将无人机防御成本转嫁给公司
summary: Russia is passing on some of the responsibility for protecting critical factories and infrastructure onto private companies as Kyiv ramps up drone attacks on industrial plants, ports and oil refineries.

title: Indonesia Moves to Expand Police Role in Civilian Government
title_cn: 印度尼西亚采取行动扩大警察在文职政府中的作用
summary: Indonesia will allow police officers to legally hold civilian administrative positions, a move that could increase the role of security officials in government.

title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Talks
title_cn: 伊朗和以色列承诺停止威胁会谈的袭击
summary: Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations and led President Donald Trump to appeal for de-escalation.

title: ‘Skillful Populism’ Has Swiss Set for Tight Population Cap Vote
title_cn: “熟练的民粹主义”让瑞士面临紧缩的人口上限投票
summary: Switzerland is set for a nail-biter vote on a proposal to cap the population at 10 million, after a two-pronged push by campaigners that paired a polished appeal to sustainability-minded moderates with harsher anti-immigrant messaging.

title: Knicks Fans Spending Thousands on Tickets Can’t Buy Hometown Win
title_cn: 尼克斯球迷花费数千美元买不到家乡胜利
summary: The tickets were priced as high as six figures, but money is no guarantee of happiness.

title: Singapore Pivots From Baby Incentives as Fertility Rate Hits Low
title_cn: 随着生育率下降，新加坡放弃婴儿激励措施
summary: Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong said his government will focus on making life better for families and rely less on incentives to encourage citizens to have more babies, as the city-state grapples with a record-low fertility rate.
